title: Marketing Director
description:
Fresh grad? Just finished ORD? Or maybe you’re thinking about trying something new in your career?
If you’re looking for a fresh start, something exciting, or a role that lets you grow fast — this might be exactly what you need.

And don’t worry if you’re new to this — no experience is required at all.
We’ll teach you everything from scratch, step by step.

✨ What You’ll Be Doing (In a Simple, Fun Way)

🎉 Join Fun Events & Roadshows

You’ll get to be part of lively events, promotions, and on-ground activities. Every day feels a little different, and you’ll never be stuck doing the same thing over and over.

🤝 Do Face-to-Face Conversations

You’ll talk to customers, share product information, and learn how to communicate clearly and confidently. It’s a great way to build people skills.

🏢 Work With a Supportive Team

We have a friendly, positive, and energetic team that helps each other out. You’ll never feel alone — there’s always someone there to guide or support you.

📚 Take Part in Workshops & Training

We’ll run simple but effective workshops to help you improve your communication, mindset, leadership, and sales skills. Everything you learn here will help you in ANY future job too.

🚀 Grow at Your Own Pace

If you’re someone who likes challenges, there are opportunities to take on more responsibilities and even lead teams in the future.

💰 What You’ll Get Out of This Job

✔ Weekly Payment

No need to wait a whole month — you get your earnings weekly.

✔ Unlimited Commissions

Your effort = your income. The harder you work, the more you earn.

✔ Performance Bonuses

If you hit your goals, you’ll receive extra incentives on top of your usual earnings.

✔ Upskilling Workshops

These sessions help you improve your communication, confidence, and overall work performance.

✔ Leadership Opportunities

If you show potential, you can move up quickly into leadership or team roles.

✔ Travel Opportunities

There may be chances to travel overseas for events, trainings, or exposure.

✔ Friendly Work Culture

We celebrate achievements, encourage teamwork

postedCompany.description:
Threshold Prodigy is a growth-focused marketing company that helps businesses expand their market reach through strategic campaigns, strong brand positioning, and performance-driven execution. Guided by our motto, “Crossing boundaries, achieving greatness,” we are committed to building a trusted and reputable brand alongside our clients.

We continuously explore new markets, strategies, and ideas to challenge conventional thinking and stay relevant, adaptable, and competitive in a fast-changing industry. Our focus remains on delivering sustainable growth and measurable results with integrity and passion.

As we grow, we place strong emphasis on developing our people. At Threshold Prodigy, our team comes first—we provide opportunities for leadership, client management, and personal development while nurturing the next generation of leaders with the skills and mindset to succeed in any environment.
postedCompany.name: THRESHOLD PRODIGY
